metadata.legal_warning: Possession of these items may result in planar-level bounties.

weapons.name: The Sword of Zariel
weapons.attunement: Requires a creature the sword deems worthy (Bravery/Heroism)
passive_buffs: Resistance to Fire, Radiant, and Necrotic
weapons.active_powers: Holy Light: 15ft Bright Light (Fiends have Disadvantage on attacks within).
weapons.transformation: Permanently transforms wielder into a heavenly, idealized version of themselves. Alignment becomes Lawful Good.
weapons.destruction: Can only be destroyed by Zariel herself or by shattering the 'Companion' in Elturel.

weapons.name: Axe of the Dwarvish Lords
weapons.curse_transformation: Non-dwarves lose 1 Charisma point on touch. 20% chance to negate any other magic item touched. Gradually transforms wielder into a Dwarf.
weapons.destruction: Must be melted in the Earthheart Forge or freely given to the Orc deities.

weapons.name: Blackrazor
weapons.special_skills: Soul Hunter: On kill, gain Temp HP = Target's Max HP. While Temp HP exists, gain Haste-like effects.
weapons.curse_effect: Soul Hunger: If it doesn't kill within 3 days, it drains the wielder's levels/HP. If wielder dies, their soul is eaten (no resurrection).

weapons.name: Rakdos Riteknife

soul_mechanic.resurrection_lock: Slain creatures can only be revived via Wish.

active_powers: Siphon Vitality: Release souls to heal 1d10 per soul.
Annihilation: If 5 souls are held, target with < 75 HP must DC 15 Con save or die.
weapons.flavor: The blade is serrated like a demon's maw; it whispers the names of the trapped.

weapons.name: Snicker-Snack
weapons.special_skills: Beheading: On a Natural 20, decapitates target. Ignores slashing resistance. Can use Charisma for attack/damage rolls.
weapons.fickle_nature: Attunement ends if you miss 3 times in a row. Must win a Charisma contest to regain its trust.
weapons.nemesis: Vulnerability: Jabberwocks are specifically vulnerable to this blade.

weapons.name: The Wand of Orcus
weapons.attunement: Required (Non-evil creatures take 10d6 dmg on touch)
active_powers: Call of Undeath: Conjure 500 HP worth of Skeletons/Zombies.
Spells: Animate Dead, Blight, Circle of Death, Finger of Death, Power Word Kill.
weapons.destruction: Must be taken to the Positive Energy Plane or crushed by the foot of a Solar.

weapons.name: Staff of the Magi
weapons.attunement: Required by a Sorcerer, Warlock, or Wizard
weapons.active_powers: Spell Absorption: Use reaction to absorb a spell targeting you to gain charges.
weapons.spells: Fireball (7th level), Lightning Bolt (7th level), Plane Shift, Telekinesis, Invisibility (at-will).
weapons.retributive_strike: Break the staff to deal 8 x remaining charges in Force damage. 50% chance to travel to another plane instead of dying.
